name: Seonji Kim
statement: Designing **shared spatial experiences** that connect people, tasks, and heterogeneous physical environments.
about: I am a **Ph.D. student** in the **Graduate School of Culture Technology at KAIST** and a member of the **Ubiquitous Virtual Reality Lab**, advised by **Prof. Woontack Woo**. My work explores how **augmented reality** and **spatial computing** can support collaboration across different physical environments.

research.title: Meta-Object
research.summary: Real-time XR Interface Technology Development for Environmental Adaptation

research.title: OpenXR: TranSpace 3.0
